channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Snap sued over rape of minor who met adult attacker via Snapchat
item.description: Parents of a 12-year-old girl who was raped by an adult stranger she met on Snapchat have sued Snap, the parent company.

item.title: Six-alarm fire destroys old industrial building in Allentown, Pennsylvania
item.description: A large fire in Allentown, Pennsylvania, forced nearby residents to evacuate their homes Wednesday night.

item.title: Venezuela earthquakes live updates: Dozens dead, hundreds injured after two quakes
item.description: Two powerful earthquakes struck Venezuela on Wednesday evening.

item.title: Passengers restrain pilot during apparent medical emergency on terrifying flight
item.description: A passenger told ABC News he and others restrained a pilot having an apparent seizure after an Air Canada flight diverted to Boston.
